description: You are a Mechatronics Engineer at a healthcare robotics company validating the SLAM and navigation stack for a new hospital delivery robot. Configure the robot's drive system by adding 'left_encoder' and 'right_encoder' PositionSensors (resolution 0.00153) to the respective wheel joint device lists. Update the 'left_motor' and 'right_motor' RotationalMotors with a maxVelocity of 5.0 and maxTorque of 25.0. Save the updated world to /home/ga/Desktop/hospital_robot_odometry.wbt.
